content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(5, 9, 0), (1, 5, 2), (4, 7, 2), (1, 7, 3), (1, 9, 3), (3, 7, 5), (0, 5, 6), (5, 8, 10), (0, 4, 11), (5, 6, 11), (2, 4, 12), (4, 5, 13), (2, 9, 16), (0, 7, 17), (3, 4, 17)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 10.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (5, 9, 0) has node 5 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 5, 2) has node 1 and time 2. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 7, 2) has node 4 and time 2. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 7, 3) has node 1 and time 3. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 9, 3) has node 1 and time 3. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 7, 5) has node 3 and time 5. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 5, 6) has node 0 and time 6. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 8, 10) has node 5 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 4, 11) has node 0 and time 11. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (5, 6, 11) has node 5 and time 11. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 4, 12) has node 2 and time 12. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 5, 13) has node 4 and time 13. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 9, 16) has node 2 and time 16. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 7, 17) has node 0 and time 17. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 4, 17) has node 3 and time 17. -> Add node 4.

The nodes matched are 5, 7, 9, and 10.

Answer: [5, 7, 9, 10]
